  as={"h1"}

  children={"Get datasource info"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/datasources/{id}/info"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns datasource metadata including name, type, tags, display name, description, and available schema names.
